lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

Note: the mid-2024 engineering rework hugely buffed HGE drop rates — older guides understate yields. State/allegiance gating can overlap, so a signal isn't guaranteed to be the exact mat, but it is always a G5 manufactured material.

sources.label: EDGalaxy (HGE finder)
sources.what: Live High Grade Emission signal lookup, sorted by G5 material — per-material links in Section 5.

sources.label: Inara — Nearest Systems
sources.what: Allegiance + state system search behind the per-material "Find live" links in Section 5.

sources.label: Frontier Forums
sources.what: "HGE for Dummies" — the allegiance + state → material gating used in Section 5.

sources.label: AXI Wiki
sources.what: Engineering-materials gathering and the over-collect / cross-trade economics.

sources.label: Fandom Wiki
sources.what: G5 manufactured-material identities, allegiance/state gating, high-pop spawn rule.

sources.label: Video guide
sources.what: Walkthrough of the relog loop and collector-limpet method.

sources.label: YouTube — Mile 13 Gaming
sources.what: Tutorial on farming Grade-5 manufactured materials at High Grade Emissions: signal selection, collector limpets, relog respawn, and trader downconversion.
